a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Representation of women in the lower chamber of parliament, 2024
Share of women in the lower chamber of parliament compared to women's population share. Values lower than
1 indicate fewer women are parliamentarians than would be expected given their population share, a value
higher than 1 indicates more women than expected.
